forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 10 and 13.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 12.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 12.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 14.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Patches of morning frost in the north. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 15.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost south of Hawker. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of morning frost west of Nullarbor. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost west of Coober Pedy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 22.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the day then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
